taxonomy: Campylospermum cabrae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. This family is part of the larger order Ochnales, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "itching cures". The order Ochnales is further divided into several families, with Ochnaceae being one of the primary ones. The Ochnaceae family consists of approximately 35 genera and over 450 species of plants.
